---
title: "Giulia Proteomics"
---

Bulk microglia proteomics analysis of mouse brain samples from the Destrooper lab. Data was acquired by DIA mass spectrometry and processed with Spectronaut, then analysed in R.

## Study design

Four genotypes, 4 animals each (n=16 total):

| Group | Samples | Microglia |
|-------|---------|-----------|
| hApp | GA_1–4 | Yes |
| hAppNLGF | GA_5–8 | Yes |
| hAppNLGF_FIRE | GA_9–12 | No (FIRE KO) |
| hApp_FIRE | GA_13–16 | No (FIRE KO) |


## Analysis

| Notebook | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [1. Initial QC](notebooks/01_initial_qc_spectronaut.qmd) | Protein counts, MAD outlier detection, PCA, correlation heatmap, contaminant check |
| 2. MSstats | Differential abundance analysis across all pairwise contrasts |
| [3. DE Plots](notebooks/03_DE_plots.qmd) | Volcano plots and visualisation of differentially abundant proteins |
| [4. GSEA](notebooks/04_gsea.qmd) | Gene set enrichment analysis using GO, KEGG, and cell-type signatures (C8) |
